The following events took place in approximately '''28,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Reign of the Ax|Reign]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Adas]] over the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] begins. He unifies the Sith nations<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> and [[Circle (Sith Pureblood)|tribes]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].<ref name="The Old Republic Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
